title: CLDF dataset derived from Wichmann's "Lexicostatistical Dataset of Mixe-Zoquean" from 2006
author: Søren Wichmann
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Cite the source of the dataset as: 

 
 Cysouw, M., Wichmann, S., & Kamholz, D. (2006). A critique of the separation base method for genealogical subgrouping, with data from mixe-zoquean. Journal of Quantitative Linguistics, 13(2-3), 225–264. doi:10.1080/09296170600850759
